explanation: The user requests to clean the mug. The mug is currently on top of sinkbasin_1. To clean it, the robot must first move to the sink (sink_0), turn on the faucet to ensure water is available, pick up the mug, pour its contents into the sink basin, and then place the mug back on a countertop to restore it to a clean state. The plan follows the standard cleaning procedure: move to sink, turn on faucet, pick up object, pour, and return to a safe location. The holding status is updated accordingly throughout the plan.
